case_title: BUTIER, ROBERT JR. VS YELENA KATANTSEVA CEO, PROPERTY MANG/MERCH.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BUTIER, ROBERT JR. AS TO DEFENDANT YELENA KATANTSEVA CEO, PROPERTY MANG/MERCH. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YELENA KATANTSEVA CEO, PROPERTY MANG/MERCH.
DEFT'S REQUEST TO ADVANCE DATE TO 8/12/03 TO BE HEARED WITH OTHER RELATED CLAIMS FILED. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-15-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-12-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTIER, ROBERT JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YELENA KATANTSEVA CEO, PROPERTY MANG/MERCH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
